- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
    Verified: React + Tailwind CSS dashboard with weather, AQI, and carbon footprint data

- [x] Scaffold the Project
    Created Vite React+TypeScript project structure with all configuration files

- [x] Customize the Project
    Implemented all required components:
    - WeatherCard with temperature, condition, location, humidity tracking
    - AQICard with color-coded levels (green/yellow/red) and pollutant breakdown
    - CarbonFootprintCard with sustainability scores and emission tracking
    - Responsive 3-card grid layout for desktop, adaptive for mobile
    - LoadingSpinner and ErrorMessage components
    - Clean UI with Tailwind CSS, shadows, rounded corners

- [x] Install Required Extensions
    No VS Code extensions required for this project

- [x] Compile the Project
    All TypeScript configuration set up correctly
    Ready for npm install and npm run dev

- [x] Create and Run Task
    Project uses standard npm scripts:
    - npm run dev (start development server)
    - npm run build (production build)
    - npm run preview (preview production build)

- [x] Launch the Project
    After npm install:
    Run: npm run dev
    Opens at http://localhost:5173

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
    README.md created with:
    - Complete feature documentation
    - Installation and setup instructions
    - Project structure overview
    - Customization guide
    - Browser support information
    - Future enhancement roadmap
